title: Cisco security advisory (AV26-613)
description: On June 17, 2026, Cisco published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in multiple products. Included were critical updates for the following product:
products: Cisco ISE and ISE-PIC Releases prior to 3.3 - all versions
Cisco ISE and ISE-PIC Release 3.3 - versions prior to 3.3 Patch 11
Cisco ISE and ISE-PIC Release 3.4 - versions prior to 3.4 Patch 6
Cisco ISE and ISE-PIC Release 3.5 - versions prior to 3.5 Patch 4 (August 2026)
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
